title: Update podman load example
body:
### Feature request description

The example for the [podman-load](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/docs/source/markdown/podman-load.1.md) document shows:

    $ podman load --quiet -i fedora.tar

Consider showing an example for `.tar.gz` (or `.tgz`) instead of `.tar`. It isn't immediately apparent from reading the documentation that compressed files are supported.


### Suggest potential solution

Change `.tar` to `.tgz`.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

n/a

### Additional context

n/a

comments.body: Please open a PR with your suggested change, kills two birds with one stone.

Some of the containers/image compression is really slow.

So you might want to just run `gunzip`, before `podman`...
